description_long: This is a medium-sized, angular rock with a dark gray coloration and a matte finish. The surface is mostly hard and slightly rough, with visible cracks and creases, especially prominent on one face. The rock has a somewhat pyramidal shape, with a broad base tapering to a peak, and its sides are uneven and faceted. The coloration is consistent throughout, with subtle shading that suggests natural weathering but no artificial markings. Its size and form make it suitable as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A dark gray, angular rock with a matte, slightly rough surface and visible cracks on one side. Its pyramidal shape and medium size make it suitable as an urban obstacle or landscape feature.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's most detailed face, featuring prominent cracks and a sharp, angular peak.
description_view_1: This side is smoother and less detailed, with a broad, flat surface and minimal visible features.
description_view_2: This view highlights the rock's tallest face, with subtle shading and a gently sloping surface.
description_view_3: This angle shows a combination of smooth and slightly creased surfaces, with the peak visible at the top.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
